start.name: Cain
start.text: Finally, our first date. I heard you always come here.

start.name: Lyra
start.text: Mhm. After school... It’s good for clearing my head.

start.name: Cain
start.text: You finally included me in this place, then.

start.name: Lyra
start.text: Well, here we are, love. Should I not have come?

start.name: Cain
start.text: I don't know... I just thought maybe you had more important plans.

choices.text: I was just afraid you'd find an excuse to stay away.
I'm just glad you're here now. That’s all that matters.

funny_story.name: Lyra
funny_story.text: It’s my day off. Don’t think I’m only here because I’m free, though... I mean, you get it.

funny_story.name: Cain
funny_story.text: You were going to tell me something funny.

funny_story.name: Cain
funny_story.text: The one about the subways. You told me to remind you if you forgot.

funny_story.name: Lyra
funny_story.text: Oh... My dad says I used to always mix up the names of vehicles when I was little.

funny_story.name: Lyra
funny_story.text: I’d call cars 'trucks' and trucks 'cars.' I didn't believe him at first, but my mom confirmed it too.

funny_story.name: Cain
funny_story.text: What color is that car passing by, then?

funny_story.name: Lyra
funny_story.text: I know it’s a truck now. Are you satisfied?

choices.text: I have to check. You get confused so easily.
I'm sorry. I shouldn't treat you like a child.

pistachio_car.name: Lyra
pistachio_car.text: Then, do you know the color of that car passing by?

pistachio_car.name: Cain
pistachio_car.text: There was a promise you made me about this place. Do you remember?

pistachio_car.name: Cain
pistachio_car.text: You promised. On our first date... You’d hold my hand. For the first time.

choices.text: But you did. You said it would happen today. Don't take it back.
Maybe I just wanted to hear it so badly that I convinced myself you said it.

hand_holding.name: Lyra
hand_holding.text: Did I say that? I can't remember.

hand_holding.name: Lyra
hand_holding.text: I think you’re lucky we didn't get into an argument and cancel the plans again. Like we always do.

hand_holding.name: Cain
hand_holding.text: I’m lucky every moment I’m with you.
